title: Modern Glass Doors(Forge)
description: Unofficial Forge port of Modern Glass Doors.Original mod by thefirethirteen (Fabric version).
body:
Tired of normal, boring doors without glass in them? Well, look no further! Modern Glass Doors aims to spice up your world with more modern-looking, glassy doors.
Unofficial Forge port of Modern Glass Doors.Original mod by thefirethirteen.
